title: tradescantia atlantica
intro: Tradescantia atlantica, also known as the Purple Queen or Wandering Jew, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. Tradescantia atlantica is a low-maintenance, trailing plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Tradescantia atlantica can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to digestive problems.
